/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-O1 -shared -Wl,-soname,libeasync_ai.so -o libeasync_ai.so CMakeFiles/easync_ai.dir/src/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/easync_ai.dir/src/SGLM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/easync_ai.dir/src/tokenizer.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/radmann/EaSync/lib/thirdParty/onnxruntime-linux-x64-1.20.1/lib: /home/radmann/EaSync/lib/thirdParty/onnxruntime-linux-x64-1.20.1/lib/libonnxruntime.so
